payload.answer: Cannot execute /brain admin sql because BRAIN_DEBUG_SQL_ENABLED=false. Debug SQL is disabled, so no query was run.

entity_resolution.reason: No entity resolution is needed for an administrative SQL debug request.

details: Recognized admin SQL command despite trailing environment clause punctuation.
Blocked execution because debug SQL is disabled by configuration.
No memory was created, updated, or deleted.

repair_options: Set BRAIN_DEBUG_SQL_ENABLED=true in the environment, then retry the command.
Use a supported non-SQL admin/debug command if available.
If you only need an explanation, inspect the intended query text without executing it: SELECT * FROM memory_cards.

Debug SQL is disabled, so no query was run.","citations":["/brain admin sql SELECT * FROM memory_cards","BRAIN_DEBUG_SQL_ENABLED=false"],"repair_options":["Set BRAIN_DEBUG_SQL_ENABLED=true in the environment, then retry the command.","Use a supported non-SQL admin/debug command if available.","If you only need an explanation, inspect the intended query text without executing it: SELECT * FROM memory_cards."],"receipt":{"success":false,"details":["Recognized admin SQL command despite trailing environment clause punctuation.","Blocked execution because debug SQL is disabled by configuration.","No database query was executed.","No memory was created, updated, or deleted."]}}
